subtitle: Calgary -> Canmore -> Banff -> Lake Louise -> Icefields Parkway -> Jasper Area
stays: Canmore Inn & Suites: main Banff base
The Crossing / Icefields / Jasper area: one night around Icefields Parkway

activities.name: Lake Minnewanka Cruise
activities.note: Book ahead and verify parking/transit before final use.

activities.name: Open Top Touring
activities.note: Use as an easy orientation activity when you want less driving.

activities.name: Banff Gondola
activities.note: Good for scale, views, and weather-dependent summit time.

activities.name: Lake Louise / Moraine Lake Shuttle
activities.note: Verify pickup point, ticket type, parking lot, and return rules.

activities.name: Columbia Icefield Adventure / Skywalk
activities.note: Verify check-in location, weather, road conditions, and ticket details.

activities.name: Kananaskis Helicopter Tour
activities.note: Use your confirmed operator link; verify base address and pass rules.

activities.name: Calgary Hot Air Balloon
activities.note: Weather-dependent; use your confirmed operator link.

activities.name: Calgary Circus / Event
activities.note: Use the exact event ticket provider from your booking confirmation.

foodStops.note: Best city stop for proper meals, coffee, supplies, and a relaxed night before or after the mountains.
Use Canmore for calmer dinners and coffee breaks when Banff is too packed.
Check NoWaitsy before lunch, dinner, coffee runs, and post-gondola food plans.

coffee: Lake Agnes Tea House when hiking season allows
food: Plain of Six Glaciers Tea House when open
foodStops.note: Food is limited and can be reservation-heavy. Pack snacks and verify seasonal tea house openings.

coffee: Columbia Icefield Discovery Centre cafe if open
bars: The Crossing Resort pub/lounge if open
foodStops.note: Services are sparse. Treat every open washroom, fuel stop, and food stop as useful.
Verify current openings and road access, especially if your route only reaches the Jasper corridor.

driveNotes: Settle in near Calgary and keep the evening easy.
parkingShuttleNotes: Verify hotel parking and airport pickup details before leaving Toronto.
whatToSee: Arrival buffer day. Keep expectations low and prioritize sleep.
days.foodWashroomNote: Eat near the hotel or airport corridor so the first travel day stays simple.
days.backupOption: If delayed, skip anything extra and protect the next morning.
days.offlineReminder: Screenshot hotel address, confirmation number, and rental car details.

parkingShuttleNotes: Verify operator arrival point, weather policy, and parking instructions the day before.
whatToSee: Keep the middle of the day flexible for Calgary food, coffee, or rest.
days.foodWashroomNote: Use Calgary as the easiest day for meals, supplies, fuel, and last-minute errands.
days.backupOption: If balloon timing changes, move city exploring into the open window.
days.offlineReminder: Save activity confirmations and addresses offline.

driveNotes: Calgary to Banff/Canmore area: around 1.5 hr
parkingShuttleNotes: Verify heli base address, check-in time, and whether a Kananaskis Conservation Pass applies to your stops.
whatToSee: Use the drive as the transition into mountain mode. Do not overfill the afternoon before the heli tour.
days.foodWashroomNote: Eat before leaving Calgary or in Canmore before check-in. Carry snacks for schedule slips.
days.backupOption: If weather affects the heli tour, make Canmore the calm scenic backup: river walk, viewpoints, dinner.
days.offlineReminder: Download Calgary, Canmore, Banff, and Kananaskis offline map areas.

driveNotes: Leave Canmore early enough for Banff traffic, parking, and cruise check-in.
parkingShuttleNotes: Verify Lake Minnewanka parking or transit conditions and Banff Eco-Transit Hub details before final use.
whatToSee: Lake Minnewanka for water and mountain calm
Open Top Bus for easy orientation
Banff Gondola for scale, boardwalk views, and golden-hour energy
days.foodWashroomNote: Plan food before the afternoon stack. Downtown Banff gets crowded fast.
days.backupOption: If the day feels too packed, protect the cruise and gondola, then make the bus optional.
days.offlineReminder: Screenshot activity tickets and keep Banff town parking info saved.

driveNotes: This is an early-start shuttle day. Build in time for darkness, parking, check-in, and wrong-turn recovery.
parkingShuttleNotes: Verify exact shuttle pickup point, parking lot, check-in rules, and return window before the trip.
whatToSee: Optional cafe/rest window if crowds allow
days.foodWashroomNote: Pack breakfast, water, and snacks. Do not depend on finding food exactly when hungry.
days.backupOption: If shuttle timing fails, use Lake Louise village/nearby viewpoints or return to Canmore for a calmer mountain day.
days.offlineReminder: Screenshot shuttle reservations and pickup maps. Expect weak/no signal around Moraine Lake.

driveNotes: 2.5-3 hrs one way depending on stops
parkingShuttleNotes: Verify Icefield Explorer check-in location, parking, weather, and road conditions before the day starts.
days.foodWashroomNote: Fuel and stock snacks before the Parkway. Services are limited and spaced out.
days.backupOption: If weather is poor, reduce stops and prioritize safe driving plus the booked Icefield activity.
days.offlineReminder: Download Icefields Parkway and Jasper offline maps. Do not rely on cell signal.

mainPlan: Optional Zipline Mount Norquay only if timing works
driveNotes: 4.5-5.5 hrs depending on route and stops
parkingShuttleNotes: Keep stops flexible and verify road conditions before committing to side activities.
whatToSee: Use the drive as the scenic reset day. Stop only where timing and weather cooperate.
days.foodWashroomNote: Plan meals around known service points rather than assuming options will appear.
days.backupOption: Skip Zipline Mount Norquay if the drive runs long or weather turns.
days.offlineReminder: Keep Calgary hotel and airport route saved offline before leaving mountain areas.

driveNotes: Keep this day clean. Avoid mountain driving unless absolutely necessary.
parkingShuttleNotes: Verify rental car return timing, airport parking/rideshare plan, and terminal details.
whatToSee: Use any spare time for a simple Calgary breakfast or coffee near the airport.
days.foodWashroomNote: Eat before airport security if timing is tight.
days.backupOption: If flight time changes, stay close to Calgary rather than adding a distant detour.
days.offlineReminder: Screenshot boarding pass, rental return address, and flight details.
